theme_and_archetype.instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the site feels like a premium, trustworthy automotive repair center. High contrast is essential. Follow the strict alternating section rhythm: Dark hero -> light services -> dark why us -> light how it works -> dark CTA -> light location -> dark footer.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight leading-[0.9]

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Always apply `uppercase` and `tracking-tight` to Barlow Condensed headings. Body copy should use standard Inter.

color_palette.rules: Use the dark charcoal (#212121) as the base for dark sections. The red accent (#C62828) is for primary CTAs, active states, and small decorative highlights (like 1px borders or icons). CTAs must always have white text.

spacing_and_layout.rules: Employ generous spacing. Alternate section backgrounds strictly as requested. Grid items must be direct children. Utilize 'Optical Alignment'.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C62828] hover:bg-[#B71C1C] text-white uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#C62828] text-[#C62828] hover:bg-[#C62828] hover:text-white uppercase font-bold tracking-widest px-8 py-4 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#1DA851] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl transition-transform hover:scale-110 flex items-center justify-center

cards.light: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E5] p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

ui_components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 bg-[#2A2A2A] border border-[#333333] text-white text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

motion_and_interactions.rules: Subtle entrance animations. Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered fades and slide-ups. Add hover lifts (-translate-y-1) to service cards.

sections.name: Header
sections.layout: Fixed top, bg-[#212121]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#333333] z-40. Logo left, Nav right with CTA.

sections.name: Hero
sections.layout: Min-height 90vh, flex items-center relative. Background image (well-lit garage) with bg-[#212121]/80 overlay. Left-aligned typography. H1 'La Firma Automotriz', subheadline, primary CTA 'Agenda tu Cita'.

sections.name: Vehicles Banner
sections.layout: Thin strip right below hero. bg-[#1A1A1A] py-8. Marquee or flex row of car brand logos (Toyota, Nissan, Hyundai, Honda, Ford) to establish scope of service.

sections.name: Services
sections.layout: bg-[#F5F5F5]. Grid 1 col mobile, 3 cols desktop. 6 cards: Diagnóstico, Frenos, Mantenimiento Preventivo, Suspensión, Llantas, Aire Acondicionado. Each card has a Lucide icon in red (#C62828).

sections.name: Why Us / Trust
sections.layout: bg-[#212121]. Split layout: 1/2 image of mechanic working, 1/2 content. H2 '¿Por qué elegirnos?'. Bullet points with check icons: Transparencia total, Mecánicos certificados, Repuestos de calidad, Garantía en servicio.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: bg-white. 3-step vertical line or horizontal cards. 1. Contacto/Cita 2. Diagnóstico y Presupuesto 3. Reparación y Entrega.

sections.name: Reviews / Trust
sections.layout: bg-[#F5F5F5] (same block as How it works or distinct). Masonry or carousel of 3 testimonials from local customers.

sections.name: Pricing Teaser
sections.layout: Included inside the Services or How it works section, mentioning 'Precios transparentes desde...'.

sections.name: CTA Band
sections.layout: bg-[#C62828] py-16 text-center text-white. H2 '¿Tu auto necesita mantenimiento?'. Large secondary CTA button (white bg, red text).

sections.name: Location / Contact
sections.layout: bg-white. Split layout: Address/Hours/Contact info on left, embedded map (iframe or placeholder visual) on right. Mention 'Curridabat, San José'.

sections.name: Footer
sections.layout: bg-[#111111] border-t border-[#333333]. Simple links, copyright 'Nexo Sites'.

hero_garage.description: Well-lit garage with a car on a hydraulic lift, used as hero background with dark overlay.

mechanic_trust.description: Mechanic working on car engine, used in the 'Why Us' section.

services_bg.description: Spacious indoor car garage, can be used as subtle background or supplementary image.

customer_review.description: Happy customer inside a vehicle, can be used near reviews or trust sections.
